programme.desc: In Rock River Renegades, the Range Busters roar back into action! When a dangerous gang stirs up trouble along Rock River, Crash Corrigan, Dusty King, and Alibi Terhune saddle up to bring law and order to the frontier. With fast-paced gunfights, daring stunts, and Alibi’s trademark humor, this action-packed Western delivers all the thrills fans of the series love.

programme.title: Code Of The Cactus 1939

With fast-draw courage and sharp wits, he takes on the outlaws to protect the frontier’s lifeline. Filled with hard-riding action, shootouts, and frontier justice, this thrilling Western proves the West was won by men who lived by a code as tough as the cactus itself.

programme.title: S2E1 Moto
programme.desc: Celebrate the women of GoPro, including British rally driver Catie Munnings, who rose to fame after winning the FIA European Rally Championship Ladies Trophy at just 18. Watch snowboarder Alina Hight who made history as the first to land a double backside alley-oop rodeo in a halfpipe competition. Meet Teigan Nash, co-founder of Girls Who Glow, inspiring young women everywhere. Plus, experience even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S3E1 Moto
programme.desc: GoPro Athlete and Formula 1 star Daniel Ricciardo teams up with Race Service Co-Founder James Kirkham for an unforgettable ride through Los Angeles. With eight Grand Prix victories and 32 podiums to his name, the Honey Badger spends his day off behind the wheel of supercars like the Ford GT, racing past Beverly Hills, the Sunset Strip, and into the winding roads of Benedict Canyon. Plus, enjoy even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E1 El Nino
programme.desc: Chasing El Niño follows Chris Benchetler on an epic skiing adventure from California’s Mammoth Mountain and the Sierra Nevada backcountry to the vast slopes of British Columbia. Joined by longtime friends Bryan Fox, Scotty Smith, and Canadian pro skier Nick McNutt, Chris explores previously inaccessible terrain, searches for perfect powder, and faces challenging weather conditions. Along the way, the crew embraces the joy of skiing, building creative jumps at their campsite and making the most of every moment on the mountain. This episode captures the thrill of exploration, friendship, and the relentless pursuit of epic lines.

programme.title: S1E2 El Nino
programme.desc: Chris Benchetler continues his epic skiing adventure from California’s Mammoth Mountain and the Sierra Nevada backcountry to the massive slopes of British Columbia. This time, X Games gold medalist Jossi Wells joins him for "The Sierra Trifecta," tackling skiing, climbing, and biking all in a single day. Chris and his crew hike 6,000 vertical feet through rugged rock fields to chase the last snow of the season in the Sierras, pushing their limits and capturing every thrilling moment.

programme.title: S1E1 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: Inside Pro Surfing: Rip Curl Pro Bells Beach presented by Bonsoy 2025
programme.desc: Bells Beach on Victoria's South Coast is the longest-running surfing competition and will host the 62st edition this year. Bells is Australian surfing heritage. With the hope of scoring long-period, groomed walls, the surfers will need to display the perfect combination of power, precision, and timing. The biggest surfing legends have had the honor of winning and ringing ‘The Bell' and 2025 will see a hungry new generation vying for the opportunity to cement their names in one of surfing's most prestigious events.

programme.title: Eat Play Stay: Spin and Shag in Greer, SC
programme.desc: Near the foothills of the Blue Ridge Mountains, go for a spin on the track and on the dance floor. Order a tiny coffee and get cozy in a tiny house. Chat up alpacas and introduce yourself to the granddaughter of a legendary four-legged athlete. It’s all possible in Greer, South Carolina.

programme.title: Fighting for Freedom: The United States v. Hamid Hayat
programme.desc: 14 years after he was arrested on federal terrorism charges, a Northern California man is freed after his case is overturned.

programme.title: Crimes, Cons and Capers: Super Rare Stolen Treasures
programme.desc: From a 300-year-old violin valued at $6 million, to thousands of rare books, thieves will go to wild, even dangerous, lengths to snatch up irreplaceable treasures. For investigators, it's a race against the clock to recover these priceless valuables.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen: Is This a Pork Chop?
programme.desc: Chef Yesinia Melo of Jessy’s Clean Meals in Lawrence takes on Chef Jason Gentles of Sahel in Lowell in a spicy battle of the mill towns. Can Yesinia’s fresh cooking put the Jerk champion in his place? Or will Jason knock it out of the park?

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness: A Surprise Shopping Spree for Homeless Teens in Bend, OR
programme.desc: From surfing the waves to surfing the shops, Justin and Ryan find a way to have both a good time and do a good deed in Oregon.
